creator: ru@FreeBSD.org
text:
On Fri, Oct 15, 1999 at 04:03:28PM +0100, aledm@alice.net.uk wrote:
> 
> User wanted to disable sending of replies to ICMP Timestamp requests
> FreeBSD has no knob to control this.
> 
What's wrong with ipfw(8)'s `deny icmp from any to any icmptype 14'?
